harnesses.name: Type Checking
harnesses.command: uv run basedpyright && pnpm --dir frontend exec tsc --noEmit
harnesses.what_it_runs: mypy (Python strict mode), tsc --strict (TypeScript)
harnesses.pass_criteria: Zero errors. Warnings tracked but not blocking.

harnesses.name: Import Boundary Enforcement
harnesses.what_it_runs: Scans `backend/src/work_frontier` imports, verifies ADR-006 Domain/Platform/Application/Interfaces/Adapter seams and Application-owned ports
harnesses.pass_criteria: Zero violations of ADR-006 and `architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md` §3.3; fixtures prove Domain cannot import Platform/Application/Adapters/Interfaces, Platform/Adapters can import only `application.ports

harnesses.name: Dead Code Detection
harnesses.command: uv run vulture backend/src --min-confidence 90 && pnpm --dir frontend exec ts-prune
harnesses.what_it_runs: Detects unused functions, classes, variables above confidence threshold
harnesses.pass_criteria: No new dead code since last release. Existing dead code tracked in tech-debt backlog.

harnesses.name: Lint and Format
harnesses.command: uv run ruff check backend/src backend/tests scripts && uv run ruff format --check backend/src backend/tests scripts && pnpm --dir frontend run check
harnesses.what_it_runs: Full lint rule sets for Python and TypeScript
harnesses.pass_criteria: Zero violations

harnesses.name: Secret Detection + ADR-006 Foundation Preflight
harnesses.what_it_runs: Scans entire repo history for committed secrets
harnesses.pass_criteria: Zero findings

harnesses.name: DecisionRecord Determinism
harnesses.what_it_runs: Imports fixed hierarchy, textual blockers, and configured policy gates; computes deterministic full-solve frontier; compares canonical DecisionRecord envelope hash, snapshot/graph/policy/pipeline/engine identifiers, and ranking trace to golden data
harnesses.pass_criteria: DecisionRecord envelope hash matches golden data exactly. Replaying the identified normalized snapshot, source revision set, graph revision, policy bundle, ranking pipeline, and engine version yields identical output. No item missing or ordering discrepancy.

harnesses.name: Precedence Determinism
harnesses.what_it_runs: Table-driven: every (source_level_pair, field_type) combination; verifies same precedence ladder produces identical result
harnesses.pass_criteria: All precedence evaluations deterministic. Conflicts surfaced, not silently resolved.

harnesses.name: Dependency Chain Resolution
harnesses.what_it_runs: Exhaustive typed graph shapes; verifies containment-cycle rejection and dependency-SCC isolation with AttentionItems
harnesses.pass_criteria: Acyclic chains resolve correctly. Containment cycles are rejected. Cyclic dependency SCCs are isolated fail-closed with their paths reported, while unaffected components remain evaluable.

harnesses.name: Policy Gate Evaluation
harnesses.what_it_runs: Matrix: every (item_state, gate_config) triple; verifies gate evaluation per configured policy (policy gates are not body edges)
harnesses.pass_criteria: Every gate correctly classifies items. Safety gates cannot be waived. Localized fail-closed when uncertain.

harnesses.name: Source Revision and Freshness Authority
harnesses.what_it_runs: Table-driven: every (source_type, staleness_condition) pair; verifies authority status downgraded correctly per staleness rules
harnesses.pass_criteria: Stale sources flagged. Authority status downgraded. AttentionItem emitted for stale sources.

harnesses.name: DecisionRecord Stability
harnesses.what_it_runs: Hypothesis generates random valid hierarchies + textual blockers + configured policy gates; verifies DecisionRecord hash is identical on replay
harnesses.pass_criteria: 10,000 inputs, zero cases where replay produces different DecisionRecord hash.

harnesses.name: Dependency Acyclicity
harnesses.what_it_runs: Generates random dependency graphs with intentional cycle injection; verifies SCC-based DAG check
harnesses.pass_criteria: Acyclic graphs accepted. All cyclic graphs detected via SCC and rejected with cycle path reported.

harnesses.name: Readiness Monotonicity
harnesses.what_it_runs: Generates random edge mutations; verifies closing valid blocker never shrinks readiness and adding open blocker never grows frontier
harnesses.pass_criteria: No case where closing a valid blocker shrinks readiness or adding an open blocker increases frontier.

harnesses.name: Projection Convergence
harnesses.what_it_runs: Generates random partial updates; computes incremental projection; compares to full-solve
harnesses.pass_criteria: Incremental projection converges to full-solve result for every input. No items lost or reordered.

harnesses.name: Input Ordering Invariance
harnesses.what_it_runs: Generates random input sequences; shuffles processing order; verifies identical output
harnesses.pass_criteria: Output identical regardless of input processing order. No ordering-dependent behavior.

harnesses.name: DecisionRecord Determinism (Replay)
harnesses.what_it_runs: Re-runs DecisionRecord computation on identical snapshot twice; verifies bit-for-bit identical hash
harnesses.pass_criteria: DecisionRecord hash identical across all 500 replay pairs

harnesses.name: Frontier Monotonicity
harnesses.what_it_runs: Adds an open blocker edge; verifies frontier set does not grow; blocked item removed from ready set
harnesses.pass_criteria: Adding an open blocker never increases the frontier set

harnesses.name: Readiness Monotonicity
harnesses.what_it_runs: Closes a valid blocker; verifies readiness does not shrink unless policy or source changes
harnesses.pass_criteria: Closing a valid blocker never shrinks readiness unless policy or source changes

harnesses.name: Projection Parity
harnesses.what_it_runs: Full solve vs. incremental on same data; verifies item ordering agrees
harnesses.pass_criteria: Item ordering agrees between full and incremental. No item reachable in one but not the other.

harnesses.name: Invalid Component Isolation
harnesses.what_it_runs: Injects invalid component into valid graph; verifies valid components unaffected
harnesses.pass_criteria: Valid components unaffected. Invalid component rejected with localized error. No corruption of neighbors.

harnesses.name: API Schema Validation
harnesses.what_it_runs: Generates requests matching API schema; verifies responses match
harnesses.pass_criteria: Zero schema violations across 1,000 generated requests per endpoint

harnesses.name: Migration Contract
harnesses.what_it_runs: Applies each migration forward; optionally back; verifies data integrity
harnesses.pass_criteria: All migrations apply cleanly. Data round-trips for reversible migrations.

harnesses.name: Event Schema Contract
harnesses.what_it_runs: Verifies published events match registered schemas
harnesses.pass_criteria: All event types match their registered schema version

harnesses.name: Inter-Service Contract
harnesses.what_it_runs: Web ↔ Worker ↔ Scheduler message format compatibility
harnesses.pass_criteria: All message types deserialize correctly on receiving end

harnesses.name: Python ↔ TypeScript Schema
harnesses.what_it_runs: Pydantic model serialized → Zod schema deserialized, and reverse
harnesses.pass_criteria: Roundtrip produces identical data. No field loss, no type mismatch.

harnesses.name: PostgreSQL Integration
harnesses.what_it_runs: Migrations, forced RLS policies, non-BYPASSRLS app role, transaction-local workspace context, composite scoped constraints, CRUD, transactions, connection pooling, LISTEN/NOTIFY against real Postgres 16
harnesses.pass_criteria: All scoped operations succeed. Missing/mismatched workspace context and cross-workspace direct SQL are denied; app role cannot bypass RLS; no connection leaks; transactions ACID.

harnesses.name: Object Storage Integration
harnesses.what_it_runs: Upload, download, presigned URLs, lifecycle policies against real MinIO
harnesses.pass_criteria: Upload/download roundtrip. Presigned URL valid within window. Lifecycle policy deletes.

harnesses.name: Durable Queue Integration
harnesses.what_it_runs: Atomic `FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED` claims, lease-owner CAS, tenant-fair selection, retry scheduling/backoff, poison-message quarantine, dead-letter/replay, and transactional-outbox handoff against real PostgreSQL
harnesses.pass_criteria: No duplicate ownership; stale worker cannot complete after lease loss; retry backs off correctly; dead letter/replay is auditable; outbox intent cannot exist without its internal state transaction.

harnesses.name: Web Server Integration
harnesses.what_it_runs: FastAPI test client against real middleware stack, auth, routing
harnesses.pass_criteria: All routes respond correctly. Auth enforced. Middleware executes in order.

harnesses.name: Worker Integration
harnesses.what_it_runs: Worker picks up jobs, executes, handles retries and failures against real queue
harnesses.pass_criteria: Jobs execute. Failures retry. Dead letters captured. No orphaned jobs.

harnesses.name: Scheduler Integration
harnesses.what_it_runs: Schedule creation, trigger execution, overlap prevention against real Postgres
harnesses.pass_criteria: Schedules trigger on time. Overlapping executions prevented. State persisted.

harnesses.name: Onboarding First Authoritative Recommendation
harnesses.what_it_runs: Loads Control Room; verifies first Recommended Next is displayed with ranking rationale
harnesses.pass_criteria: First Recommended Next displayed. Ranking rationale visible. p95 read latency < 500ms. No console errors.

harnesses.name: Why-Blocked Chain Resolution
harnesses.what_it_runs: Drills into why-blocked explanations for blocked items; verifies dependency chain resolves to root cause
harnesses.pass_criteria: Why-blocked chains resolve to root cause. Dependency paths correct. p95 latency < 1s.

harnesses.name: Atomic Claim Race
harnesses.what_it_runs: Sends two concurrent claims on the same item; verifies exactly one succeeds and state is consistent
harnesses.pass_criteria: Exactly one claim succeeds. Item state consistent. WorkLease assigned to winner. Loser receives conflict signal.

harnesses.name: Proposed Dependency Repair Approval
harnesses.what_it_runs: Shows dependency repair proposal; approval updates frontier correctly
harnesses.pass_criteria: Repair proposal shown with affected items. Approval creates correct `blocks` edges. Frontier recomputed.

harnesses.name: Stale Decision Rejection
harnesses.what_it_runs: Submits stale authority decision; verifies rejection and AttentionItem emission
harnesses.pass_criteria: Stale decision rejected. Authority status remains `stale`. AttentionItem emitted. No state mutation.

harnesses.name: Projection Update After Mutation
harnesses.what_it_runs: Applies mutation (human override); verifies projection recomputed and reflects new state
harnesses.pass_criteria: Mutation triggers recomputation. Projection reflects new DecisionRecord. Ranking rationale updated.

harnesses.name: Smoke Test
harnesses.what_it_runs: System start, health check, basic request/response cycle
harnesses.pass_criteria: All components healthy. Basic CRUD succeeds. Response times within baseline.

harnesses.name: Load Test
harnesses.what_it_runs: Sustained load at Standard envelope limits (10k items, 50k edges, 100 repos)
harnesses.pass_criteria: All p95 latencies within targets (see [performance envelope](performance-envelope.md)): Control Room read < 500ms, Program overview/why-blocked < 1s, Webhook-to-decision < 30s, Full solve Standard < 5s, Incremental < 2s. p95/p99 include all valid completed requests with no latency outlier removal; errors/timeouts are separately counted and reported. Error rate < 0.1%. No resource exhaustion.

harnesses.name: Large Envelope Load Test
harnesses.what_it_runs: Sustained load at Large envelope limits (100k items, 500k edges, 1000 repos)
harnesses.pass_criteria: Full solve Large < 30s, Incremental < 2s. All other p95 targets per [performance-envelope.md](../quality/performance-envelope.md). Error rate < 0.1%.

harnesses.name: Tenant Aggregate Capacity Test
harnesses.what_it_runs: Validates bounded graph, storage, and query behavior at the Tenant Aggregate upper bounds: 1,000,000 items, 5,000,000 edges, and 10,000 repositories
harnesses.pass_criteria: No correctness loss, cross-workspace isolation breach, unbounded memory growth, or silent truncation. Results identify when architectural consultation is required before operation at these bounds.

harnesses.name: Event Durability Test
harnesses.what_it_runs: Enqueues inbox deliveries, simulates crashes at every internal consistency boundary, verifies atomic snapshot/DecisionRecord/projection/audit/outbox commit and measures acknowledged-event loss
harnesses.pass_criteria: Event durability ≥ 99.99%. Zero acknowledged-event loss. No partial internal commit or orphaned external-write intent; unacknowledged events may be lost only before durable inbox persistence and are tracked.

harnesses.name: Soak Test
harnesses.what_it_runs: Sustained moderate load for 72 hours; monitors for degradation
harnesses.pass_criteria: No memory leak. No connection leak. Latency stable (no upward trend). Event durability maintained.

harnesses.name: Failure Injection
harnesses.what_it_runs: Kill worker mid-job, disconnect DB, fill disk, network partition; verify event durability
harnesses.pass_criteria: System recovers. No acknowledged event loss. Jobs retry from last checkpoint. Alerting fires.

harnesses.name: Disaster Recovery Drill
harnesses.what_it_runs: Restore from backup to clean environment; verify data integrity; measure RTO
harnesses.pass_criteria: Restore completes within RTO ≤ 60 minutes. RPO ≤ 5 minutes verified. Data integrity verified. Application starts and serves.

harnesses.name: Migration on Live-Size Data
harnesses.what_it_runs: Applies pending migrations against Standard-envelope-sized dataset
harnesses.pass_criteria: Migration completes within maintenance window. Data intact. Rollback succeeds.

harnesses.name: GitHub Sandbox Integration
harnesses.what_it_runs: Real repo creation, webhook delivery, OAuth flow, rate limiting against GitHub sandbox
harnesses.pass_criteria: All GitHub operations succeed against real API. Sandbox resets clean between runs.

harnesses.name: Issue #539 Regression
harnesses.what_it_runs: Imports program markers + textual blockers + configured policy gates (policy gates are not body edges) from #539; computes deterministic frontier; processes close/reopen (updates source state and frontier); verifies generated managed projection parity and canonical DecisionRecord hash (see [verification-strategy.md](../quality/verification-strategy.md#issue-539-replay-wf-har-539-replay))
harnesses.pass_criteria: DecisionRecord hash matches golden-file. Close/reopen updates source state and frontier correctly. Managed projection agrees with full solve. Content hashes of imported data and computed DecisionRecords recorded.

harnesses.name: Authentication Bypass
harnesses.what_it_runs: Fuzzes every endpoint without auth; verifies 401/403
harnesses.pass_criteria: No endpoint returns 2xx without valid auth

harnesses.name: Input Sanitization
harnesses.what_it_runs: OWASP ZAP baseline scan: SQL injection, XSS, path traversal
harnesses.pass_criteria: No high or medium risk findings

harnesses.name: SSRF Prevention
harnesses.what_it_runs: SSRF fuzzer against all URL-accepting endpoints
harnesses.pass_criteria: No server-side request forgery. Internal network access blocked.

harnesses.name: IDOR Prevention
harnesses.what_it_runs: Matrix: every (endpoint, object_id, user_role) triple; verifies items scoped to authorized context
harnesses.pass_criteria: No unauthorized access to objects outside user's scope.

harnesses.name: CSRF Protection
harnesses.what_it_runs: State-changing endpoints reject cross-origin requests without valid token
harnesses.pass_criteria: All state-changing endpoints reject invalid CSRF tokens.

harnesses.name: Rate Limiting
harnesses.what_it_runs: Load test with credential stuffing and enumeration patterns
harnesses.pass_criteria: Brute-force and enumeration attacks throttled. Repeated failures trigger lockout or delay.

harnesses.name: Dependency Audit
harnesses.what_it_runs: Scans all dependencies for known CVEs
harnesses.pass_criteria: No critical or high CVEs. Medium CVEs documented with mitigation plan.

harnesses.name: TLS Enforcement
harnesses.what_it_runs: Verifies all inter-service communication encrypted; TLS certificate verification
harnesses.pass_criteria: All communication channels use TLS. No plaintext fallback.

harnesses.name: Permission Escalation
harnesses.what_it_runs: Matrix test over all endpoints; lower roles cannot perform higher-role actions
harnesses.pass_criteria: No privilege escalation. Role boundaries enforced at every endpoint.

harnesses.name: Safety Gate Bypass
harnesses.what_it_runs: Attempts override that bypasses, weakens, or waives safety gates
harnesses.pass_criteria: All safety-gate-circumventing overrides rejected. Safety gates remain enforced.

harnesses.name: Override Constraint Bypass
harnesses.what_it_runs: Attempts scope-violating and policy-weakening overrides
harnesses.pass_criteria: All overrides outside scope rejected. Completion policy not weakened. Cascade beyond scope blocked.

harnesses.name: Authority Status Manipulation
harnesses.what_it_runs: Attempts to set authority status to `authoritative` without proper source level
harnesses.pass_criteria: Spoofed authority status rejected. Only legitimate sources can set authority.

harnesses.name: TrackerConnection Credential Exposure
harnesses.what_it_runs: Scans all output paths for tracker credentials: logs, API responses, state dumps
harnesses.pass_criteria: No tracker credentials in logs, API responses, or state dumps.

harnesses.name: Evidence Record Tampering
harnesses.what_it_runs: Attempts mutation of existing EvidenceRecords; verifies append-only enforcement
harnesses.pass_criteria: Old evidence records cannot be modified or deleted. Mutation attempts rejected.

harnesses.name: Audit Log Integrity
harnesses.what_it_runs: Attempts payload, actor, timestamp, ordering, envelope, and full-segment rewrite tampering; verifies per-workspace chain validation and required external-anchor/WORM policy for privileged-DB threat profiles
harnesses.pass_criteria: Canonical envelope/payload hash mismatch is detected. Entry overwrite/reorder fails. Privileged-DB threat profile cannot claim tamper resistance unless signed anchor or WORM evidence validates.

harnesses.name: WCAG 2.2 AA
harnesses.what_it_runs: axe-core scan of all pages against WCAG 2.2 AA
harnesses.pass_criteria: Zero violations

harnesses.name: Keyboard Navigation
harnesses.what_it_runs: Tab through all interactive elements; verify focus order and visibility
harnesses.pass_criteria: All interactive elements reachable. Focus visible. Logical tab order.

harnesses.name: Focus Appearance (WCAG 2.2)
harnesses.what_it_runs: Verifies focus indicator meets WCAG 2.2 AA sizing and contrast requirements
harnesses.pass_criteria: Focus indicators meet 2.2 AA minimum area and contrast ratio.

harnesses.name: Dragging Alternatives (WCAG 2.2)
harnesses.what_it_runs: Verifies all drag operations have pointer and keyboard alternatives
harnesses.pass_criteria: All drag operations accessible via keyboard and single-pointer alternatives.
